message:
fix: Prevent arithmetic overflow and state bugs across widgets and render

- Layout solver: use saturating_add for Max constraint checks (lib.rs:355,364)
- Presenter: use saturating_add for cursor_x tracking (presenter.rs:250)
- Frame/Drawing: widen to u32 for wide-char fit check to prevent u16 overflow
- Frame: reset cursor_position in clear() to prevent stale cursor bleeding
- TextInput: reset scroll_cells in set_value() to prevent stale scroll state
- TextInput: use actual mask char width instead of hardcoded 1
- Pretty: fix row_idx u16 truncation that could bypass height guard
- Pretty: use saturating_add for y position calculation
- Virtualized: clamp scroll to len-visible_count instead of len-1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
